## Type of change

- [ ] Content — new section or edits to existing content
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature / improvement
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Docs / meta (README, CONTRIBUTING, etc.)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally (no TypeScript errors)
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] New content files include all required frontmatter fields (`title`, `description`, `accent`, `lastUpdated`, etc.)
- [ ] New Lucide icons are added to the allow-list in `app/utils/resolveLucideIcon.ts`
- [ ] No hard-coded colors — section colors go through `--accent-<key>` CSS vars
- [ ] New sections are added to `app/utils/sections.ts` and the `accent` enum in `content.config.ts`
